config.damage_indicator.title: Damage Indicator Settings
config.damage_indicator.maxRenderDistanc: Maximum distance (in blocks) at which damage indicators are rendered
config.damage_indicator.baseScale.toolti: Base size of the damage indicators
config.damage_indicator.damageFormat.too: Format string for displaying damage (e.g., %.1f for one decimal place)
config.damage_indicator.showDecimals.too: Show decimal values or round to integers
config.damage_indicator.lifetime.tooltip: How long indicators stay visible (in milliseconds)
config.damage_indicator.popDuration.tool: Duration of the pop animation (in milliseconds)
config.damage_indicator.fadeStartTime.to: When the fade-out animation starts (in milliseconds)
config.damage_indicator.criticalScaleMul: Size multiplier for critical damage indicators
config.damage_indicator.criticalPopEffec: Intensity of the pop effect for critical hits
Intensity of the pop effect for normal hits
